Prof. Dr. Lecturer. Project Support to Prof. Dr. Perrin Öğün Emre from TUBITAK 3005 Program

One of the professors of the Department of Advertising, Dr. Assist. Prof. Dr. Perrin Öğün Emre’s project titled “The Effect of Discourses on Brain Drain in Internet Media and Social Media on the Brain Drain Approaches and Migration Attitudes of the Potential Audience” has been entitled to be supported under the TÜBİTAK 3005 Program.

The project aims to address brain drain from a media perspective. The project primarily focuses on the brain drain discourses circulating in the online media and social media and aims to evaluate the emotional and cognitive approaches of the potential audience of higher education students between the ages of 18-40 to brain drain.

We congratulate Prof. Perrin and wish him and Dr. Özen Baş, who is a researcher in the project, success in their research.We congratulate Prof. Perrin and wish him and Dr. Özen Baş, who is a researcher in the project, success in their research.
